title: SubmitPreflightSpec
description:
Input spec for the ``submit-preflight`` composite primitive (WS5 #1, repurposed).

Collapses the top-of-submit boilerplate — ``install-commands`` +
``load-context`` + (optional) ``check-preflight`` — into one CLI call.
Mirror of ``status-preflight`` with a cluster SSH-connectivity check on
top: submit needs SSH at submit time; status does not.

The prior incarnation fanned export-package + plan-throughput +
validate-campaign in parallel — that framing was wrong (the trio is at
three separate Steps with hard data dependencies and can't be
parallelised). This is the genuinely-composable boilerplate.

experiment_dir.title: Experiment Dir
experiment_dir.description: Absolute path to the experiment directory.

cluster.title: Cluster
cluster.description: Optional cluster name. When supplied, check-preflight runs the cluster_ssh_echo functional probe through the production ssh_argv / multiplex / crypto path AND resolve-resources runs concurrently to resolve walltime/gpu_type/partition; without it, only the local-env checks fire (ssh agent, ssh/rsync on PATH, clusters.yaml parses).

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Run profile (run_name) forwarded to resolve-resources' runtime-prior lookup. No-op when --cluster is absent.

cmd_sha.title: Cmd Sha
cmd_sha.description: Optional cmd_sha to filter resolve-resources' runtime prior. No-op when --cluster is absent.

walltime_sec.title: Walltime Sec
walltime_sec.description: Caller override for walltime_sec forwarded to resolve-resources; skips the runtime-prior probe. No-op when --cluster is absent.

gpu_type.title: Gpu Type
gpu_type.description: Caller override for gpu_type forwarded to resolve-resources; skips the cluster gpu_types[0] default. No-op when --cluster is absent.

safety_mult.title: Safety Mult
safety_mult.description: Multiplier applied to the prior p95 to size walltime in resolve-resources (default 1.30). No-op when --cluster is absent.

partition.title: Partition
partition.description: Caller override for partition forwarded to resolve-resources; skips recommend-partition. No-op when --cluster is absent.

user_preferred_partition.title: User Preferred Partition
user_preferred_partition.description: Soft partition preference forwarded to resolve-resources. No-op when --cluster is absent.

skip.title: Skip
skip.description: Sub-calls to skip. Useful in tests where a previous call established freshness; production callers should pass an empty list.

timeout_sec.title: Timeout Sec
timeout_sec.description: Per-sub-call subprocess timeout. install-commands is a local filesystem op (<1s typical); load-context touches journal + clusters.yaml (single-digit seconds); check-preflight without --cluster is ~50ms, with --cluster adds a ~5s SSH round-trip on the slow path.
